headlines.text: Trump calls Iran ceasefire 'on massive life support' after rejecting Tehran's proposal as 'a piece of garbage'
April CPI rises 3.8% annually — hottest inflation since May 2023 — as Iran war sends energy costs soaring
Wall Street falls: S&P 500 down ~0.8%, Nasdaq off ~1.5% as inflation shock and Iran war stall mood
National gas average hits $4.50+ per gallon; JPMorgan warns $5 gas 'can no longer be dismissed'
Trump departs for Beijing to press Xi Jinping to help force Iran into a deal
Hegseth and Joint Chiefs chair Caine face Congress over Trump's $1.5 trillion defense budget request
Hantavirus cruise outbreak: 18 passengers being monitored at US medical units after disembarking the MV Hondius
Supreme Court allows Alabama to eliminate its second majority-Black congressional district
Senate votes to advance Kevin Warsh nomination to Fed Board — one step closer to becoming Fed chair
Katy Perry's 'one that got away' TikTok goes mega-viral after ex Josh Groban's engagement announcement

breaking.text: Trump says he is more seriously considering resuming major combat operations in Iran as ceasefire hangs by a thread

stories.hed: Ceasefire on 'Massive Life Support' as Trump Eyes Resuming Combat
stories.dek: Iran sent back a peace proposal demanding war reparations, sanctions relief, and sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz — Trump called it 'a piece of garbage' and didn't finish reading it. Some aides say he's now leaning toward restarting strikes, while he boards a plane to ask Xi Jinping to please talk some sense into Tehran.

stories.hed: UK and France Host 40 Nations for Emergency Hormuz Security Talks
stories.dek: Defense ministers from 40 countries gathered Tuesday to hash out plans to restore trade flows through the Strait of Hormuz, which has been effectively closed since early March, choking off roughly 20 million barrels of oil per day from global markets and threatening a massive global food crisis.

stories.hed: April Inflation Surges to 3.8%, Highest Since 2023, Fueled by Iran War Energy Costs
stories.dek: The Consumer Price Index rose 0.6% in April alone, putting the annual rate at 3.8% — well above expectations — as the Iran war's disruption of global oil supplies filters through into gas, diesel, food, and transport prices for American consumers.

stories.hed: Supreme Court Clears Alabama to Erase Second Majority-Black District Before Midterms
stories.dek: In a significant voting-rights ruling, the Supreme Court allowed Alabama Republicans to implement a congressional map with only one majority-Black district, handing the GOP a potential seat pickup ahead of November's midterm elections.

stories.hed: GameStop Tried to Buy eBay. eBay Said No. The Internet Had Thoughts.
stories.dek: eBay rejected GameStop's takeover bid, citing concerns over financing and credibility — which is a sentence that would have been incomprehensible five years ago. GameStop stock slipped 1.9%, proving the meme stock era has real consequences when the memes involve actual M&A.

markets.context: Stocks and crypto fell after a hotter-than-expected CPI print of 3.8% and Trump's 'life support' Iran ceasefire comments sent oil spiking above $100 and killed hopes for a near-term Fed rate cut.

gas.note: Gas up 51% since the war started — your wallet called, it's filing for conscientious objector status.

popCulture.hed: Katy Perry Goes Viral Fake-Crying in a Bathrobe After Ex Josh Groban Gets Engaged
popCulture.dek: Katy Perry posted a TikTok of herself in a white robe dramatically chugging champagne and sobbing to her own song 'The One That Got Away' after news broke that her 2009 ex Josh Groban proposed to actress Natalie McQueen. She captioned it 'congrats' with a champagne emoji and somehow made everyone root for her.

genZ.definition: An AI-generated wooden stick-man holding a baseball bat that originated from Indonesian Ramadan folklore — it 'visits' anyone who sleeps through the pre-dawn meal. Born on TikTok in 2025 as part of the Italian Brainrot wave, it got a second life in 2026 after landing in Fortnite and spawning millions of remix edits, CapCut templates, and crossover battles.
genZ.usage: The Iran ceasefire? Bro the ceasefire is giving Tung Tung Tung Sahur energy — it shows up out of nowhere, makes a lot of noise, and threatens to beat something with a stick.

tldr: Trump declared the Iran ceasefire on 'massive life support' after calling Tehran's peace proposal 'a piece of garbage,' then boarded a flight to Beijing to ask Xi Jinping to fix it. Back home, a 3.8% CPI print confirmed the war is costing Americans real money at the pump and the grocery store, sending stocks down and oil past $100 a barrel.
